entry.title: New: RES25-220 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF ONE (1) HI-BACK TRADITIONAL BENCH, PREPARATIONS OF THE GROUNDS AND A BRONZE PLAQUE WITH AN INSCRIPTION TO READ, “DONATED BY THE FAMILY OF JOE AND GLADYS ESPOSITO,” VALUED AT $2,819.51 FROM MARTIN ESPOSITO TO BE PLACED AT KAILUA BEACH PARK.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
